title: Workflow block ID in app payload
excerpt:
Since workflow blocks (triggers and actions) can be use in custom automations now, the recipe ID in this scenario becomes meaningless. It would be nice if there was a workflow block ID. 
A number of recipes/workflow bloc…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since workflow blocks (triggers and actions) can be use in custom automations now, the recipe ID in this scenario becomes meaningless. It would be nice if there was a workflow block ID.

A number of recipes/workflow blocks can get handled by the same code - and hence same URL. But different recipe versions, and knowing if its a custom automation vs a defined recipe may alter how its processed.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @anon29275264!

Thank you for the feedback!

I will share it with the team
